category: Items typically unrolled or unwound for use
explanation: Carpet, Scroll, Yoga Mat, and Film Reel are all physical objects that are commonly unrolled or unwound for their intended function. 'Red Tape' is an idiom for excessive bureaucracy and is not physically unrolled in its common, conceptual meaning.

category: Original Seven Wonders of the Ancient World
explanation: The Great Pyramid of Giza, Hanging Gardens of Babylon, Lighthouse of Alexandria, and Statue of Zeus at Olympia are all among the original Seven Wonders of the Ancient World. The Colosseum, while a magnificent ancient structure, is not part of that traditional list.
Ate (eight), For (four), Too (two), and Won (one) are all homophones of single-digit numbers. Sum is not a homophone for any single-digit number.
